zh.Wooler, Northumberland, England: 英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德武爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert de Muschamp  of Wooler IV於大約1188年出生在英國諾圖波藍德時，他的父親Thomas de Muschamp40歲，母親Maud Vesci55歲。他和Isabel de Hardon至少有3個女兒。他去世於大約1250年在英國享年64歲。

zh-hans.Wooler, Northumberland, England: 英国英格兰諾圖波藍德武爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert de Muschamp  of Wooler IV于大约1188年出生在英国諾圖波藍德时，他的父亲Thomas de Muschamp40岁，母亲Maud Vesci55岁。他和Isabel de Hardon至少有3个女儿。他去世于大约1250年在英国享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Muschamp
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from North and South Muskham (Notts), recorded in gallicized forms such as Muscamp and Muschamp from the 12th century onwards.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Wooler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Wooller
meanings: 2 English: nickname, sometimes a derivative of Middle English woll, wull ‘wool’ (Old English wull), for a wool dealer or someone who worked with wool. Compare Thomas le Wollestere, 1297 in Wakefield Court Rolls (WR Yorks). Some of the bearers below may belong with (1).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert de Muschamp  of Wooler IV was born about 1188, in Northumberland, England, his father, Thomas de Muschamp, was 40 and his mother, Maud Vesci, was 55. He had at least 3 daughters with Isabel de Hardon. He died about 1250, in England, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert de Muschamp  of Wooler IV est né environ 1188, à Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Muschamp, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Maud Vesci, avait 55 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 filles avec Isabel de Hardon. Il est décédé environ 1250, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert de Muschamp  of Wooler IV um 1188 in Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas de Muschamp 40 und seine Mutter Maud Vesci 55. Er hatte mit Isabel de Hardon mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb um 1250 im Alter von 64 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert de Muschamp  of Wooler IV è nato il circa 1188 nel Northumberland, England, il suo padre, Thomas de Muschamp, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Maud Vesci, aveva 55 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figlie con Isabel de Hardon. Morì circa 1250, nel England, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Muschamp  of Wooler IVが約1188年にイギリスノースウンバーランドで生まれた時，父Thomas de Muschampは40歳，母Maud Vesciは55歳であった。彼はIsabel de Hardonとの間に少なくとも3人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1250年にイギリスで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Muschamp  of Wooler IV(이)가 대략 1188년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Muschamp(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Vesci(은)는 55세였다. 그는 Isabel de Hardon(와)과 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1250년 영국에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert de Muschamp  of Wooler IV nasceu aproximadamente 1188, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Muschamp, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Maud Vesci, tinha 55 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhas com Isabel de Hardon. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1250, em Inglaterra, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert de Muschamp  of Wooler IV родился около 1188 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas de Muschamp было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Vesci, 55. У него было по крайней мере 3 дочери от Isabel de Hardon. Он умер около 1250 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert de Muschamp  of Wooler IV nació aproximadamente 1188, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas de Muschamp, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Maud Vesci, tenía 55 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijas con Isabel de Hardon. Murió aproximadamente 1250, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 64 años.
